events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess rebar placement commercial project. Observed field condition: missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt). Work rough-complete. Treat as roughly 70 percent complete until defects corrected. Need decision fail because non-compliant/dangerous? Missing chairs/supports means mat resting on dirt, not at proper elevation, inadequate concrete cover, potential corrosion, non-compliance with ACI 318/117 and placing drawings. Decision must be fail. Risk high? Missing support can cause structural deficiency, but immediate hazard maybe medium/high. Since non-compliant, fail. Risk high due to structural integrity and inspection rejection. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete 70. Value not asked numeric reading, use 0. Sound etc 0. Order empty. Workable empty. Findings: missing rebar chairs/supports, mat on dirt, inadequate cover, potential non-compliance. Actions: install chairs/supports per placing drawings/ACI, verify elevations and cover, re-inspect before concrete pour. Rationale. References ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.
